<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.44.3-Solothurn">
  <identifier></identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language></language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title></title>
  <abstract></abstract>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt></wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=tmerc +lat_0=0 +lon_0=13.3333333333333 +k=1 +x_0=450000 +y_0=-5000000 +ellps=bessel +towgs84=577.326,90.129,463.919,5.137,1.474,5.297,2.4232 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>2611</srsid>
      <srid>31258</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:31258</authid>
      <description>MGI / Austria GK M31</description>
      <projectionacronym>tmerc</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7004</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent/>
</qgis>
